filter_reason: Borderline but included: an OpenAI biosecurity bounty program for a frontier model is a concrete safety move from a major lab, not PR fluff.
summary: OpenAI is running a Bio Bug Bounty for GPT-5.5, inviting outside researchers to probe the model for bioweapons-relevant failure modes and paying for successful jailbreaks or safeguard bypasses. It signals how OpenAI is stress-testing biosecurity mitigations on frontier models with external red-teamers rather than only internal evals. Worth a briefing line as a data point on how frontier-lab safety practice is evolving.
title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
excerpt: Details about the OpenAI Bio Bounty program
